titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 61

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=140 status=live modified=2017-01-30 19:28:03.384072+00 | translation moa=141 status=live modified=2016-10-21 00:57:14.451197+00

div.p:
Omnibus hoc scriptum visuris uel audituris Richenda filia Wynfridi de berkeley . eternam In domino Salutem . Nouerit vniuersitas uestra me In
legitima potestate mea ⁊ In libera voluntate mea . de bona voluntate mea ⁊ concessione dominorum nostrorum abbatis ⁊ conuentus de abberbro
th’ . dedisse concessisse ⁊ hac carta me confirmasse Rogero Wyrfaut’ totam terram illam que fuit hugonis filii Waldeui In territorio de
cuneueth’ . Tenendam sibi ⁊ attornatis suis de me ⁊ heredibus meis in feodo ⁊ hereditate . libere ⁊ quiete per rectas diuisas suas cum
communi pastura de Scotestun’ . cum merchetis ⁊ blodwytis . ⁊ cum omnibus aliis iustis pertinenciis suis ⁊ aysiamentis . libere ⁊ quie
te ab omni seruitio ad me uel ad heredes meos pertinente . saluo forinseco domini Regis . de quo Ipse ⁊ attornati sui respondebunt .
videlicet quantum pertinet ad dimidiam dauach . ⁊ salua mihi multura mea de terra illa que pertinet ad molendinum de cuneveth . quam
non faciam te liberior humfrido de mediltun ⁊ Iohanne Wythard . Reddendo Inde annuatim mihi ⁊ heredibus meis ipse ⁊ attorna
ti sui  unam libram piperis ad pentecosten quando venient ad predicatm terram . ⁊ ne ego uel heredes mei contra hanc donationem ve
nire possimus  Iuramentum pro me ⁊ heredibus meis tactis sacrosanctis interposui . subponens ego ⁊ heredes mei Iurisdictionem domini episcopi sancti an
dree uel archidiaconi eiusdem loci qui per tempore fuerint . vt alter eorum me ⁊ heredes meos ad huius donationis obseruantiam  quacumque vo
luerit  censura conpellerat . Non obstante exceptione fori . nec aliqua alia excepcione nec appellatione . ne aliquo remedo Iuris ci
uilis uel canonici . Testibus domino Sibaldo milite de meornes . Domino Roberto de Rossyn . Iohanne Wyscard . Wynfrido de middeltun’ . hugone
de abberbroth’ . hugone scot ⁊ aliis .

p.cl: To all to who shall view or hear this written deed Richenda, daughter of Humphrey of Berkeley, wishes eternal salvation in the Lord.

that I, by my own lawful authority, and of my own free will, from my own goodwill and by the consent of our lords the abbot and religious community of Arbroath, have given, granted, and by this my charter made firm, to Roger Wyrfaut the whole land that belonged to Hugh son of Waldef in the territory of Conveth; For him and his attorneys to hold of me and my heirs in feu and heritage, freely and quietly by its right marches, with common pasture at Scotston, with merchets and blodwites, and with all its other rightful pertinents and easements, free and quit from all service pertaining to me or my heirs, saving the forinsec service of the lord King, for which he and his attorneys shall answer, namely for as much as pertains to half a davach, and saving to myself my multure from the land that belongs to the mill of Conveth; which I shall not make more freely to Humphrey of Middleton and John Wishart [the ‘te’ which the scribe wrote here does not appear to make sense: a different version of this charter was copied into the St Andrews cartulary, St A. Lib. 285-6]; By rendering annually thereupon to me and my heirs, he and his attorneys, one pound of pepper at Pentecost when they shall come to the aforesaid land. And so that I or my heirs are not able to act against this donation, I have given an oath upon holy relics for myself and my heirs, I and my heirs submitting to the jurisdiction of the lord bishop of St Andrews or the archdeacon of the same place, whoever it should be at the time, so that either of them might by whatsoever means they may wish compel me and my heirs by censure to the observance of this donation. Not withstanding the exception of a court, or any other exception or appeal, or any remedy of civil or canon law.
